techniques.evidence_quote: An attacker was able to execute API calls on the behalf of the Lambda function by stealing the Lambda's credentials.
An attacker was able to exfiltrate the Lambda's environment variables and export them into their attacking machine (AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, AWS_SESSION_TOKEN).
The attack started with the GetCallerIdentity command. This command is equivalent to whoami
IAM enumeration included two API calls... ListAttachedRolePolicies, ListRolePolicies
the attacker started an enumeration on different services in different regions
the attacker tried (unsuccessfully) to create a new user by executing the CreateUser command
the attacker launched a phishing attack by abusing the cloud email service, which included executing commands such as VerifyEmailIdentity and UpdateAccountSendingEnabled
the attack resulted in a phishing attack launched from a AWS Simple Email Service (SES) that the threat actor created
the attacker tried to hide some of his activities by deleting the SES identity by executing the DeleteIdentity command
the attacker tried to hide some of his activities by deleting the SES identity
